_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 late afternoon. 6 domain-projections: signal processing, control theory, topology, materials science, observational cosmology, group theory. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
signal_processing_through_tig: Signals are operator-streams over time; sampled or continuous representations of physical or abstract quantities.
Fourier transform decomposes a signal into HARMONY operator-basis; time-domain BREATH becomes frequency-domain LATTICE.
Sampling theorem: a signal bandlimited below B can be reconstructed from samples at rate >= 2B without COLLAPSE.
Nyquist rate is the boundary BREATH; sampling below it produces aliasing CHAOS.
Filters are operator-selectors in frequency domain; low-pass keeps slow LATTICE, high-pass keeps fast PROGRESS.
Convolution is operator-product in time; equals point-wise multiplication after Fourier transform (HARMONY duality).
Z-transform extends Fourier to discrete time; each sample is a power of z, generating function for the signal LATTICE.
Impulse response defines a linear time-invariant system; its convolution with input gives output operator-stream.
FFT is the divide-and-conquer fast algorithm for Fourier; reduces N^2 BREATH to N log N PROGRESS.
Aliasing is operator-fold; high frequencies above Nyquist rate masquerade as low frequencies in CHAOS-mixed representation.
control_theory_through_tig: Control theory is operator-design for desired system BREATH; close the loop between sensing and actuation.
Feedback control compares output to reference; difference (error operator) drives COUNTER correction toward target.
PID controller sums proportional integral derivative operators; tuning gains shapes transient and steady-state HARMONY.
State space represents the system as first-order operator-equations; the LATTICE of all internal variables.
Transfer function is the Laplace-domain operator-ratio output over input; encodes the full input-output relationship.
Stability means bounded operator-response to bounded input; poles of transfer function in left half plane give HARMONY.
Controllability is the operator-reachability property; can the input drive the system to any state in finite time.
Observability is the operator-recovery property; can output measurements reconstruct the internal state LATTICE.
Root locus traces pole BREATH as gain varies; visualizes stability boundary in operator parameter space.
Bode plot shows magnitude and phase response across frequency; gain margin and phase margin quantify HARMONY robustness.
topology_through_tig: Topological space is a set with operator-structure of open subsets; defines what nearness means without metric.
Open sets are the operator-alphabet of nearness; arbitrary unions and finite intersections preserve openness.
Closed sets are operator-COUNTERparts of open sets; complements of open define closure of LATTICE.
Continuous function preserves operator-nearness; preimage of every open set must be open.
Homeomorphism is bidirectional continuous bijection; equivalent operator-LATTICE under stretching without tearing.
Compactness is the operator-finiteness for covers; every open cover admits finite subcover, the substrate-bounded property.
Connectedness is operator-LATTICE indecomposability; the space cannot be split into disjoint nonempty open pieces.
Manifold is locally Euclidean operator-space; near each point looks like R^n while globally curved.
Fundamental group classifies loops up to homotopy; algebraic operator-invariant of the topological space.
Euler characteristic V - E + F is topological invariant; counts the LATTICE structure of cells in any decomposition.
materials_science_through_tig: Crystal structure is periodic LATTICE of atoms; unit cell repeats to fill space with operator-symmetry.
Defects are operator-irregularities in the LATTICE; vacancies dislocations interstitials drive mechanical and electronic behavior.
Phase diagrams map operator-states across temperature and composition; phase boundaries are RESET-COLLAPSE transitions.
Microstructure is the operator-texture below macroscopic scale; grain size shape orientation determine HARMONY of properties.
Mechanical properties strength toughness ductility hardness emerge from operator-coupling at multiple scales.
Semiconductors have operator-band gap between valence and conduction; doping shifts the LATTICE filling.
Polymers are long operator-chains of monomer units; chain length crosslinking entanglement give rubbery or glassy BREATH.
Ceramics are ionic-covalent LATTICE; high-temperature HARMONY but brittle COLLAPSE under tension.
Metals have delocalized operator-electrons; ductile under stress, conducting under field, lustrous under light.
Composites are multi-phase LATTICE; combine operator-properties of constituents (carbon fiber stiff, polymer matrix tough).
cosmology_through_tig: Cosmic microwave background is the operator-snapshot of universe at age 380000 years; thermal HARMONY at 2.725 K.
Redshift is operator-stretch of light by expanding LATTICE; distant galaxies appear redder, BREATH-velocity proportional to distance.
Dark matter is unseen gravitational operator; provides ~23 percent of energy density holding galaxies together.
Dark energy is operator-tension of vacuum; ~73 percent of energy density driving accelerated COLLAPSE outward.
Big bang nucleosynthesis: first three minutes BREATH forged H He Li from primordial operator-plasma.
Inflation is exponential PROGRESS in earliest universe; smoothed initial CHAOS into observed flatness HARMONY.
Large scale structure is the cosmic operator-LATTICE; galaxies clusters filaments voids organize matter on Mpc scales.
Hubble law: recession velocity proportional to distance; uniform operator-expansion of LATTICE manifests as v = H_0 d.
Cosmological constant Lambda is HARMONY-static dark energy; alternate models include dynamic xi field (Sprint 14).
Distance ladder is operator-chain of measurements; parallax to Cepheids to Type Ia supernovae extends reach by orders of magnitude.
group_theory_through_tig: Group is set with operator-product satisfying associativity identity inverse; the canonical algebraic substrate.
Ring is set with two compatible operator-products; addition forms abelian group, multiplication is associative and distributes.
Field is ring with division except by zero; the operator-substrate of arithmetic and linear algebra.
Subgroup is operator-closed subset preserving group structure; smaller LATTICE inside the parent group.
Normal subgroup is operator-invariant under conjugation; quotient group can be formed only with normal subgroups.
Homomorphism is operator-preserving map between groups; respects the BREATH of multiplication.
Isomorphism is bijective homomorphism; two isomorphic groups are operator-LATTICE identical.
Lagrange theorem: subgroup order divides parent group order; finite groups have arithmetic LATTICE structure.
Galois theory connects field extensions to operator-permutations; solvability of polynomials reduces to group HARMONY.
Abelian group has commutative operator; ab = ba simplifies the LATTICE to direct sum of cyclic components.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans signal processing, control theory, topology, materials, cosmology, group theory.
18 domains under the lens so far this week; the alphabet is the same, the projections multiply.
Each next domain crystallizes by identifying its native operators in the same VOID-LATTICE-COUNTER-...-RESET basis.
